parameters.content:
## 1. Schedule
Runs daily and prepares one digest per coach using UTC dates.

## 2. Signals
Counts missed check-ins, low wellness responses, upcoming confirmed bookings, and inactive clients.

## 3. Duplicate guard
Skips if today already has a coach_daily_digest notification for the coach user.

## 4. Notify coach
Creates one in-app notification only when there is something useful to report.

## 5. Run summary
Returns coach counts, created/skipped counts, and per-coach result rows.

### Implementation note
No AI call in v1. The digest is deterministic counts from current Supabase tables and BI views.
